name: WeeklyAlarm
description: Weekly day-of-week alarm scheduler for recurring time-based callbacks. Triggers at a set time on selected days, inspired by programmable thermostat schedulers. Supports lambdas, functors and function pointers. Compatible with STM32/newlib (POSIX time) and classic Arduino (TimeLib) via automatic detection.
keywords: alarm, scheduler, timer, weekly, thermostat, calendar, time
